Subscriptions automatically renew at the: Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before. Your Apple ID will be charged for renewal at the same price. You can manage and cancel your subscription in the App Store account settings.

Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before. Your Google account will be charged for renewal at the same price. You can manage and cancel your subscription in the Google Play account settings.
This cannot be undone. Your profile will: This cannot be undone. Your profile will be anonymized and your photos and videos will be permanently deleted.
Deleting your account removes your perso: Deleting your account removes your personal data in line with GDPR. The following happens:
Your name, username, email, avatar and b: Your name, username, email, avatar and bio are permanently removed.
All of your posts, including photos and: All of your posts, including photos and videos, are permanently deleted.
All of your comments and likes are perma: All of your comments and likes are permanently deleted.
Circles you created are deleted along wi: Circles you created are deleted along with everything in them.

Children who are sick, going through sur: Not every child has it easy. Illness, surgery or recovery can leave any child in need of an extra smile. That is why Innerr donates 10% of every paid subscription to a Dutch foundation for children's care.

Quick tour: we'll walk you through the m: Quick tour: we'll walk you through the main screens so you know what's possible. You can close this at any time and restart from Settings.
Tap here to choose which children to sho: Tap here to choose which children to show. Your feed then narrows to just their moments. Switch back to everyone whenever you like.
Switch between the classic list and a gr: Switch between the classic list and a grid of your moments.
New posts, likes and replies from your c: New posts, likes and replies from your circles land here.
A circle is a private group. You decide: A circle is a private group. You decide who is in it and what they can do. You'll usually have a circle for family, one for close friends, maybe one for the grandparents.
Tap here to start a new circle. Give it: Tap here to start a new circle. Give it a name and you can invite people right after.
Tap any circle to open it, manage member: Tap any circle to open it, manage members, set permissions, or change its photo.
Add members by username, email, or share: Add members by username, email, or share an invite link.
Decide who in this circle can invite oth: Decide who in this circle can invite others, view the member list, or download photos.
Owners can remove members, transfer owne: Owners can remove members, transfer ownership, or delete the circle. Members can leave whenever they want. Nobody gets locked in.
Add a name and a birth date so Innerr ca: Add their birth date too, so we can show how old your little one was in every photo.
These circles are pre-selected when you: These circles are pre-selected when you create a new post. Saves a few taps if you always share with the same group.
Toggle the circles you usually share wit: Toggle the circles you usually share with. You can always change the selection per post.
See where your moments were taken. Tap a: See where your moments were taken. Tap a photo to jump straight to the post.
This is what others see when they visit: This is what others see when they visit your profile. Tap your avatar to change it.
Edit your profile, manage notifications,: Edit your profile, manage notifications, change your language, or log out. You'll also find 'Replay tour' here.
That's the quick tour. Share a first mom: That's the quick tour. Share a first moment, invite people to a circle, and make Innerr yours. Got questions? Reach out any time at hallo@innerr.app.
